---
title: "Massachusetts School Data Dashboard"
author: "Lafaith Allen-Delice"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard) # always
```

## Intro {.sidebar}

This dashboard contains two visualizations based on NCES Massachusetts school data. The first graph is a bar chart displaying the number of schools by locale group. The second graph is a histogram displaying the distribution of student enrollment across Massachusetts schools. The data is from the NCES Massachusetts school excel datasheet.

## Column {data-width="450"}

### Massachusetts Schools by Locale Category

```{r}
## for del1Draft.rds
link1="https://github.com/lallen-student/HW3/raw/main/del1Draft.rds"
readRDS(url(link1))
```

### Distribution of Student Enrollment in Massachusetts Schools

```{r}
## for del2Draft.rds
link2="https://github.com/lallen-student/HW3/raw/main/del2Draft.rds"
readRDS(url(link1))
```
